name: Ref (npx)
description: Token-efficient documentation search for coding agents. Searches public and private technical docs, APIs, and libraries, and reads URLs as markdown to keep the context window lean.

inputs.label: Ref API Key
inputs.description: API key for your Ref account. Used to authenticate documentation search and URL-read requests.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to your Ref account at https://ref.tools
2. Open the API keys page at https://ref.tools/keys
3. Create or copy an API key
4. Paste it here

auth.instructions: Create an API key in your Ref account at https://ref.tools/keys and provide it as REF_API_KEY.
